title: NW NATURAL - 211info
text: NW NATURAL NW NATURAL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides natural gas service. Offers flexible monthly payment plans, assistance options for customers with past-due accounts, and home improvements. Also responds to reports of natural gas leaks. Website lists agencies that may offer financial assistance to low-income customers. 250 SW Taylor Street Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Customer Service: Monday-Friday 7am-6pm Natural gas leaks: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (800) 422-4012 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Customer Service (800) 422-4012 Toll-free Past-Due Bills/Credit Arrangements (503) 226-4240 Customer Service (503) 226-4211 Gas Odor Emergencies (800) 882-3377 TTY/TTD 711 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Benton, Clackamas, Columbia, Coos, Clatsop, Hood River, Lane, Lincoln, Linn, Marion, Multnomah, Polk, Washington, Wasco, and Yamhill Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 7am-6pm Services: Natural Gas Service Connection/Repair Natural Gas Service Providers Utility Bill Payment Plans Weatherization Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: UTILITIES - BILL DISCOUNT PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NW NATURAL
